name: ai-design-components
description: Comprehensive UI/UX and backend component design skills for AI-assisted development with Claude. Covers React components, design systems, deployment on AWS/Azure/GCP, CI pipelines, and more.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed (290 stars, MIT, Python, created Nov 2025). Extensive skills/ directory with 20+ skills covering UI components, networking, cloud deployment, debugging, and backend design. .claude-plugin/ present. Comprehensive install.sh (v3.0) with interactive mode, marketplace management, and plugin install/uninstall commands. CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SETUP.md, CHANGELOG.md present. VERSION file tracks releases. Also includes .claude-commands/ and evaluation/ directories. Well-maintained with structured release process. No security concerns found.
